steps.title: Identify the goal and the key contrast
steps.content: The student's goal is explicit: emphasize a DIFFERENCE between the two compositions. The notes show the specific difference in approach—Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn while Fantasy Aborigine No. 3 incorporates a Tewa seashell rattle. This contrast in methods is the decisive signal.

steps.title: Find the choice that shows the contrast
steps.content: Choice B contrasts the two pieces by specifying which Native element each composition features—hymn versus rattle—making the difference unmistakable. Choices A, C, and D either describe both pieces identically, claim different approaches without specifying them, or ignore the synthesis. That matches choice B — B is correct.
